mapper.select: SELECT t.*, p.IF_NAME, p.IF_DESCR FROM P_TRAFFIC_T t LEFT JOIN r_port_t p ON t.DEVICE_ID = p.DEVICE_ID AND t.IF_INDEX = p.IF_INDEX AND p.DELETE_AT IS NULL WHERE t.DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId} AND t.IF_INDEX = #{ifIndex} AND t.COLLECTED_AT >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{minutes} MINUTE) ORDER BY t.COLLECTED_AT ASC

SELECT t.*, p.IF_NAME, p.IF_DESCR FROM P_TRAFFIC_T t LEFT JOIN r_port_t p ON t.DEVICE_ID = p.DEVICE_ID AND t.IF_INDEX = p.IF_INDEX AND p.DELETE_AT IS NULL WHERE t.DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId} AND t.COLLECTED_AT BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY t.IF_INDEX, t.COLLECTED_AT ASC

SELECT t.*, p.IF_NAME, p.IF_DESCR FROM P_TRAFFIC_T t INNER JOIN ( SELECT DEVICE_ID, IF_INDEX, MAX(COLLECTED_AT) as MAX_TIME FROM P_TRAFFIC_T WHERE DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId} GROUP BY DEVICE_ID, IF_INDEX ) latest ON t.DEVICE_ID = latest.DEVICE_ID AND t.IF_INDEX = latest.IF_INDEX AND t.COLLECTED_AT = latest.MAX_TIME LEFT JOIN r_port_t p ON t.DEVICE_ID = p.DEVICE_ID AND t.IF_INDEX = p.IF_INDEX AND p.DELETE_AT IS NULL ORDER BY t.IF_INDEX

SELECT t.*, p.IF_NAME, p.IF_DESCR FROM P_TRAFFIC_T t LEFT JOIN r_port_t p ON t.DEVICE_ID = p.DEVICE_ID AND t.IF_INDEX = p.IF_INDEX AND p.DELETE_AT IS NULL WHERE (t.DEVICE_ID, t.IF_INDEX) IN
(#{port.deviceId}, #{port.ifIndex})
AND t.COLLECTED_AT >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{minutes} MINUTE) ORDER BY t.DEVICE_ID, t.IF_INDEX, t.COLLECTED_AT ASC
